If I could give Original Tag zero stars, I would. This game is a blatant, low-effort copy of Gorilla Tag.

The community. At this point, this game is a breeding ground for harassment. There is no moderation, no reporting tools, and no effort by the developers to curb toxic behavior. Players –  especially younger ones – are routinely subjected to verbal abuse, stalking, and other unacceptable behavior.

It’s incredibly disturbing that this kind of environment is allowed to exist in a game targeted at kids. If you're a parent, do not let your child play this. If you're a player looking for a good time, look somewhere else. There are better, safer alternatives that actually care about their community.

Avoid this disaster at all costs.

Go play Gorilla tag instead.
